name: Stir Fry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups defatted beef or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 1-quart jar or blender.
2. Seal the container and refrigerate or freeze until ready to use.
3. Shake well before using to recombine any separated components.
4. Use as a stir fry sauce or marinade for meat.
5. This recipe yields approximately 4 cups of sauce.
